component.name: Clawd on Desk
component.summary: Desktop pet that visualizes your AI coding agent's status

description.p: Clawd is a desktop pet that lives on your screen and reacts to your AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex CLI, Copilot CLI, Gemini CLI, and more). It plays pixel-art animations to show what your agent is doing — thinking, coding, waiting for permission, or idle.
